full_text:
Deng Ji 鄧濟
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Ji (鄧濟). In 197, he and his garrison at Nanyang were defeated by Cao Cao. Deng Ji was affiliated with Liu Biao.
